amenities.name: Beachfront
amenities.description: Property is directly on the beach or within a very short walk with unobstructed beach access.

amenities.name: Pool
amenities.description: Guests have access to a shared or private swimming pool on the property.

amenities.name: Kitchen
amenities.description: Includes basic cooking facilities such as stove, fridge, sink, and cookware.

amenities.name: Hot Tub
amenities.description: Private or shared hot tub or jacuzzi available for guest use.

amenities.name: Free Parking
amenities.description: Complimentary on-site or reserved parking space is included with the stay.

amenities.name: Wi‑Fi
amenities.description: Wireless internet access available throughout the rental.

amenities.name: Pet-friendly
amenities.description: Host allows guests to bring pets, sometimes with additional rules or fees.

amenities.name: Instant Book
amenities.description: Reservations can be confirmed immediately without host approval.

amenities.name: Flexible Cancellation
amenities.description: Allows free or low-fee cancellation up to a short time before check-in.

hosts.name: Coastal Stays Miami
hosts.about: We manage a curated selection of beachfront apartments and condos across Miami and Miami Beach, focused on clean, comfortable, and affordable stays.

hosts.name: Orlando Family Villas
hosts.about: Family-owned vacation homes near Orlando theme parks, all with full kitchens and private or community pools.
hosts.response_time_description: Typically responds within a few hours

hosts.name: Denver Cabin Retreats
hosts.about: Mountain-inspired cabins and chalets within a short drive of Denver, many of them pet-friendly and designed for weekend getaways.

hosts.name: NYC Urban Lofts
hosts.about: Small but smartly designed studios and lofts in central New York City, ideal for solo travelers and couples.

hosts.name: Asheville Mountain Escapes
hosts.about: A collection of cozy mountain cabins with hot tubs and scenic views around Asheville, perfect for couples and small groups.

hosts.name: EuroCity Apartments
hosts.about: Professionally managed city-center apartments across Paris, Barcelona, and Berlin, optimized for short urban stays.

promotion_codes.description: Save 20% on stays with a subtotal over $400. Valid on most properties and stay lengths.
New guest offer: 10% off your first booking with no minimum spend.
$50 off spring getaways on trips with a subtotal of $300 or more.
Archived New Year 2024 promotion (no longer valid).
15% off long stays with a subtotal of $900 or more, ideal for weekly or monthly trips.

bookings.cancellation_policy_snapshot: Flexible: full refund for cancellations up to 5 days before check-in; after that, first night non-refundable.
bookings.notes: Arriving late on Friday around 9 PM; please provide self check-in instructions.

bookings.cancellation_policy_snapshot: Standard: full refund for cancellations within 48 hours of booking and at least 14 days before check-in; 50% refund up to 7 days before check-in.
bookings.notes: Please confirm on-site parking details. Applying SAVE20 promo during checkout.

bookings.cancellation_policy_snapshot: Moderate: full refund for cancellations up to 7 days before check-in; after that, 50% refund up to check-in time.
bookings.notes: Traveling with three kids; please ensure pool fence is installed before arrival.

bookings.cancellation_policy_snapshot: Strict: 50% refund for cancellations up to 30 days before check-in; no refund within 30 days.
bookings.notes: Bringing one medium-sized dog; please confirm pet rules and nearby hiking trails.

bookings.cancellation_policy_snapshot: Flexible: full refund for cancellations up to 5 days before check-in; after that, first night non-refundable.
bookings.notes: Comparing this cabin with another option; priority is lower cleaning fee and overall cost under $600.

bookings.cancellation_policy_snapshot: Flexible: free cancellation until 24 hours before check-in; after that, first night non-refundable.
bookings.notes: Looking for instant-book studio close to city center; arrival around 6 PM.

reviews.body: Amazing beachfront location for the price. We walked to the sand in under a minute and the apartment was spotless.
Great value right on Miami Beach. Balcony view was partial ocean but still beautiful. Check-in was smooth.
Perfect weekend getaway. Small kitchen but had everything we needed. Would book again.
Ideal family home near the parks. Kids loved the pool and the kitchen was fully stocked for cooking dinners.
Spacious 3-bedroom layout with comfortable beds. Neighborhood was quiet and felt safe.
Great for families. The private pool and game room kept the kids entertained on non-park days.
Central LA location with easy access to restaurants. Street noise at night but overall a good stay.
Comfortable bed and reliable Wi-Fi. Parking in the building garage was a big plus.
Cozy cabin with beautiful views. Cleaning fee felt a bit high but the place was very clean.
Dog-friendly and close to trails. The drive up the mountain road was a little steep for our small car.
Great value cabin with a low cleaning fee. Our dog loved the fenced yard and we appreciated the clear house rules.
Very comfortable beds, quiet at night, and super accommodating host for our early check-in request.
Stunning mountain views from the hot tub. Cabin felt brand new and the kitchen was well equipped.
Exactly what we wanted for a quiet weekend. Secluded but still only 20 minutes into Asheville.
Lovely cabin with a private hot tub. A few more cooking utensils would make it perfect.
Comfortable bed and very clean. The driveway is steep so recommend an AWD vehicle.
Tiny but very functional studio right in the center. Instant book made last-minute plans easy.
Great location near the Gothic Quarter and flexible cancellation gave us peace of mind.

listings.title: Cozy Beachfront Apartment on Miami Beach
listings.description: Bright 1-bedroom beachfront apartment just steps from the sand with a small balcony and partial ocean view. Ideal for couples looking for an affordable weekend getaway.

listings.title: Sunny Miami Beachfront Studio with Balcony
listings.description: Compact studio with a queen bed, kitchenette, and private balcony overlooking the beach boardwalk. Walk to cafes, bars, and nightlife.

listings.title: Orlando Family Villa with Private Pool & Full Kitchen
listings.description: Spacious 3-bedroom home 15 minutes from major theme parks. Features a screened private pool, game room, and fully equipped kitchen for family meals.

listings.title: Large 4-Bedroom Orlando Home with Pool & Game Room
listings.description: Family-ready 4-bedroom house with heated pool, foosball table, and open-plan kitchen. Perfect for two families traveling together.

listings.title: Modern 3-Bedroom Orlando House with Pool & Chef’s Kitchen
listings.description: Stylish family home with designer kitchen, covered lanai, and south-facing pool. Short drive to Orlando’s main attractions.

listings.title: Rustic Pet-Friendly Cabin with Mountain Views
listings.description: Wood-paneled cabin in the foothills outside Denver with a wraparound deck and fire pit. Pet-friendly with easy access to nearby hiking trails.

listings.title: Cozy Pet-Friendly Cabin with Fenced Yard
listings.description: Charming 2-bedroom cabin in a quiet wooded setting with a fenced yard for dogs and a wood-burning stove for chilly evenings.

listings.title: Central NYC Studio Near Times Square (Instant Book)
listings.description: Compact but well-designed studio with kitchenette and fast Wi-Fi, located a short walk from Times Square and major subway lines. Perfect for solo travelers.

listings.title: Downtown LA Apartment with Parking & City Views
listings.description: Modern 1-bedroom apartment in a secure building with garage parking, balcony, and skyline views. Walk to restaurants and entertainment in Downtown LA.
listings.address_line: 850 S Flower St, Los Angeles, CA 90017

listings.title: Secluded Asheville Cabin with Private Hot Tub
listings.description: Romantic 2-bedroom mountain cabin with private hot tub on the deck overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Short drive to downtown Asheville.

listings.title: Mountain Cabin Retreat with Hot Tub & Fireplace
listings.description: Cozy cabin on a wooded lot with stone fireplace, private hot tub, and large windows facing the forest. Great base for hiking and brewery tours.
listings.address_line: 95 Forest Ridge Ln, Black Mountain, NC 28711

listings.title: Central Barcelona Apartment with Flexible Cancellation
listings.description: 1-bedroom apartment near the Gothic Quarter with balcony and fully equipped kitchen. Short walk to Las Ramblas and the metro.

listings.title: Downtown Chicago 3BR Apartment with Free Parking & Wi-Fi
listings.description: Spacious 3-bedroom apartment in a high-rise building near the Loop. Includes free garage parking, fast Wi-Fi, and fully equipped kitchen.

listings.title: Modern Downtown Chicago 3BR with Parking, Wi-Fi & City Views
listings.description: Corner-unit 3-bedroom apartment with floor-to-ceiling windows, free parking, and high-speed Wi-Fi, perfect for business groups or families.

listings.title: Charming Paris City-Center Apartment Near the Seine
listings.description: Classic 1-bedroom Haussmann-style apartment with high ceilings, full kitchen, and view onto a quiet courtyard, a short walk from Notre-Dame.

listings.title: Bright Paris Apartment for Families Near Montmartre
listings.description: Sunny 2-bedroom apartment with open kitchen and fast Wi-Fi in a residential area near Montmartre. Easy metro access to central Paris.
